ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Selection Of A Referee And Sale Of The Madrone Property
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Selection Of A Referee And Sale Of The Madrone Property
Off Calendar Apr-10-2012 Continued To May-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle McGill for Dennis Pustelnik. Charles Triay for Greg Pustelnik.

Counsel requested a three week continuance stating that Mr. Triay's office has a conflict with the new Proposed Trustee. Status on selection of a Referee and sale of the Madrone property was continued to May 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for selection of a new Trustee.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade/A. Payne.

Petition For Instructions On Removal Of Co-Trustee From Trust Property, Payment Of Back Rent, And Appointment Of Special Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-01-2012 Text Ruling

Petition For Instructions On Removal Of Co-Trustee From Trust Property, Payment Of Back Rent, And Appointment Of Special Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Continued To Jan-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions On Removal Of Co-Trustee From Trust Property, Payment Of Back Rent, And Appointment Of Special Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Continued To Dec-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions On Removal Of Co-Trustee From Trust Property, Payment Of Back Rent, And Appointment Of Special Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Continued To Sep-30-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle McGill for and with Dennis Pustelnik. Amir Rang for Greg Pustelnik.

The Parties reported that mediation was not conclusive and that Mr. Bare (Mediator) suggested the Parties take another stab at the remaining issues. The petition for removal, etc. was continued to September 30, 2011 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a two hour evidentiary hearing. The Court encouraged Counsel to go back to Mr. Bare.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Instructions On Removal Of Co-Trustee From Trust Property, Payment Of Back Rent, And Appointment Of Special Independent Trustee
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Continued To Jul-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions On Removal Of Co-Trustee From Trust Property, Payment Of Back Rent, And Appointment Of Special Independent Trustee
Off Calendar May-04-2011 Continued To May-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions On Removal Of Co-Trustee From Trust Property, Payment Of Back Rent, And Appointment Of Special Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Continued To May-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amir Rang for Greg Pustelnik. Michelle McGill for Dennis Pustelnik.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 27, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 28, 2011. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on May 4, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
